General.Name: ALCAT
General.Description: SA Catana Group engages in the designs, manufacture, and sale of catamarans and related services in France, Turkey, Greece, the United States of America, Martinique, Italy, Croatia, Spain, and internationally. The company markets its products under the CATANA CATAMARANS, BALI CATAMARANS, and YOT POWER CATAMARANS brand names, as well as operates a shipyard uuunder the Port Pin Rolland name. SA Catana Group was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Canet-en-Roussillon, France.
General.Address: Zone Technique Le Port, Canet-en-Roussillon, France, 66140
